_note: Real proof-of-concept outcome for a less-documented living artist. A Commons search for 'Bobby Broom' returns no category and only unrelated 'broom' files; under the PD/CC0-only policy the run yields zero images. The script handles this gracefully (no rows emitted). Enabling Flickr Commons (FLICKR_API_KEY) or widening --licenses is the path to coverage for artists like this.
